title: TuriX
abstract: TuriX simplifies AI automation by letting you describe workflows in natural language and then executing them step by step. Ideal for teams with more ideas than hands. 融合CUA（Computer Use Agent）的工业级通...
abstract_zh: TuriX就像给程序员配备了个私人小助手，你说啥它就干啥！不用写代码，直接用大白话就能指挥机器人干活儿。手忙脚乱的小团队必备神器，有了它，脑洞大的创意再也不怕实现不了啦！\[doge\]
